response.justification: Sarah is a strong generalist engineer with 15+ years of experience, solid TypeScript/Node.js skills, and recent hands-on exposure to MCP servers and agentic tooling at re:cinq. However, the role requires 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, and her GenAI experience spans roughly one year. There is no demonstrated Python depth, no evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, evaluation pipelines, or AI data pipeline work, and limited cloud AI system design beyond AWS CDK usage. The gap between her profile and the core AI delivery requirements is too large for a staff-level forward deployed GenAI role.
strengths: 15+ years of broad, production software engineering across web, backend, mobile, and embedded systems
Recent hands-on experience with MCP code generators and agentic-workflow infrastructure at re:cinq
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, testing tools authorship, and community teaching/mentoring
concerns: Only ~1 year of GenAI/agentic work versus the required 8+ years building AI-driven solutions
No demonstrated experience with RAG, vector databases, LLM evaluation pipelines, or AI data pipelines
Limited Python evidence and modest cloud-platform depth for designing enterprise AI systems

key_factors.factor: Strong general engineering and recent MCP/agentic exposure
